results.rendered_html:
dhauta p. p. [dhāv-kta ūṭh]
1 Washed, washed off, cleaned, purified, laved; kulyāṃbhobhiḥ pavanacapalaiḥ śākhino dhautamūlāḥ  Ś. 1. 15 ;  Śik. 58 ;  Ku. 1. 6 , 6. 57 ;  R. 16. 49 ; 19. 10. 
2 Polished, brightened.
3 Bright, white, shining, brightened, glistening; haraśiraścaṃdrikādhautaharmyā  Me. 7 , 44 ; vikasaddaṃtāṃśudhautādharaṃ  Gīt. 12. 
— taṃ
1 Silver.
2 Cleaning, washing.
Comp.
— kaṭa a bag of coarse cloth.
— koṣajaṃ, -kauḥ ṣeyaṃ bleached or purified silk.
— khaṃrḍā sugar-candy.
— śilaṃ rock-crystal.
